reason: The single residual finding is low impact. The file title "応答不要メッセージ送信常駐バッチ" already encodes both the key facts in the missing sentence — "応答不要" covers the use-case qualifier ("応答を伴わないメッセージ送信処理で用いる") and "常駐バッチ" combined with the s1 description of monitoring the send-request table covers the mechanism ("特定のテーブルを定期的に監視"). The s1 hints also include "応答不要メッセージ送信" and "送信要求テーブル". An AI agent retrieving this section would still correctly characterise the batch's purpose and guide a developer to the right implementation path. The omitted text is supplementary orientation prose, not actionable technical content.

findings_assessment.location: Document introduction (before 基本構造 section)
findings_assessment.justification: The missing introduction ('特定のテーブル上の内容を定期的に監視し…応答を伴わないメッセージ送信処理で用いる。') conveys purpose and use-case context that is already substantially recoverable from the file title ('応答不要メッセージ送信常駐バッチ') and from s1's description of the send-request table and INSERT-based trigger. No actionable implementation detail is lost. The finding persisted through Phase E because the Phase E fix agent produced output identical to the Phase D state — the s1 text was not modified, indicating the fix was silently skipped or the agent judged it outside scope.
